message:
fix(test): Make truncated segment test deterministic and robust

The test was potentially flaky due to:
1. Non-deterministic file iteration order from read_dir
2. Missing sync after truncation (changes might not be visible)
3. No assertion that a file was actually found to truncate

Fix:
- Sort segment files by path for deterministic file selection
- Assert that at least one segment file exists before truncating
- Use sync_all() to ensure truncation is persisted to disk
- Remove truncate(true) flag (set_len already handles this)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
